positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a celestial creature, a majestic griffin blending with cosmic nebula elements. The griffin should have sleek, powerful lines, feathered wings composed of swirling galaxy gas, and eyes that glow with deep starlight. The overall aesthetic should be a modern, neo-vintage geometric silhouette style, using limited but deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, amethyst purple, emerald green) contrasted against crisp, warm cream and charcoal outlines. The composition must feature the griffin centered and striking a dynamic, triumphant pose, suitable for a repeating seamless print on apparel. Minimalist background gradients or abstract space elements. High contrast, perfect vector quality, highly detailed, art deco influence.
negative: blur, low resolution, text, watermark, logo, signature, noise, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, dirty, ugly, childish, cartoonish, photographic
